prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-013",
          "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle",
          "priority": "low",
          "fault_type": "Preventive maintenance",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 8
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-c1aeb56931ab48e5b37c8c589fc230fe",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-D84042C4\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for the next maintenance cycle\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Preventive maintenance\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 8.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:09:52.841760Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The function call returns a work order ID, which can be used to track and manage the work order. The work order includes details such as the transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, status, estimated downtime hours, creation time, and assigned technician.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The function call returns a work order ID, which can be used to track and manage the work order. The work order includes details such as the transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, status, estimated downtime hours, creation time, and assigned technician.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": true, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": true, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Provide a clear plan and ensure the final answer directly addresses the task requirements."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Provide a clear plan and ensure the final answer directly addresses the task requirements.
